# Data Card — Synthetic Dutch RMBS

**Source:** `Algoritmica/green-lion-2024-2025` (Hugging Face), generated by deeploans
synthetic-data-designer. **Size:** 500k loans × 24 monthly cutoffs (Jan 2024–Dec 2025) =
11.2M loan-month observations. **Schema:** 71-column ESMA Annex 2 underlying-exposures
template. **Validation:** 53-test SQL suite (schema, domain constraints, lifecycle
invariants). **Limitations:** synthetic — distributions are designer-calibrated, not real
market data.
